hero.description: I build things for the web. Currently learning, shipping side projects, and looking for my first real opportunity.

about.headline: A little about me
bio: I'm a developer based in Germany, currently studying and working on side projects to sharpen my skills. I care about writing clean code and building things that actually work.
I'm actively looking for my first professional opportunity — internship or working student position. Let's build something together.

stats._note: Einschalten wenn du stolze Zahlen hast

experience._note: Setze visible:true sobald du deinen ersten Job/Praktikum hast
experience.headline: Where I've worked

items.title: PoS System for my School Kiosk
items.description: A custom-built POS system for a school kiosk – developed using Flutter for an Android tablet, a web dashboard, and an additional kitchen display. Firestore ensures real-time synchronization across all devices, even offline. Features such as modifiers/toppings, order numbers, inventory management, and PayPal QR codes are all included. Developed entirely in-house, from concept to finished APK.

items.title: A simulation of the physical photoelectric effect
items.description: For my physics class, I created a simulation of the photoelectric effect using HTML, CSS, and JavaScript to help illustrate the concept.

items.title: EmojiCodeAI
items.description: An experimental AI tool that translates text into a sequence of emojis—not as a direct 1:1 translation, but as an interpretive one. The algorithm analyzes mood, context, and key concepts, and uses them to generate an emoji sequence that, in the best-case scenario, summarizes the text better than words ever could. Small project, big question: What is lost when language consists solely of symbols?

items.title: Website for the dental practice “Zahnärzte Dammann”
items.description: Freelance project: Conceptualization and development of the official website for a dental practice. I developed the design, structure, and content entirely on my own, coordinated directly with the client, and built the site using Wix.

contact.headline: Got a project in mind?
contact.subheadline: I'm always open to new ideas, collaborations, or just a good conversation about tech.
